summary: Deprecated audit trail for the Offline Files task subrecord. The app disables the Offline Files background and logon synchronization tasks, but the publishable control surface is tracked separately in the policy record.

setting.name: Offline Files Task Bundle
setting.casual_explanation: Offline Files uses scheduled jobs to synchronize cached data. This sub-tweak disables those jobs directly.
setting.why_people_change_it: People use this when they want fewer Offline Files background actions after they already intend to disable the feature.
setting.tradeoffs_overview: Disabling the tasks reduces background sync behavior, but it is a stronger operational change than simply using the documented feature policy.
setting.professional_notes: The provider disables the Background Synchronization and Logon Synchronization tasks in the Offline Files task folder. This record tracks the task bundle as observed app behavior.

allowed_values.label: Windows default
allowed_values.meaning: The Offline Files tasks keep their normal Windows baseline.

allowed_values.label: Disable task bundle
allowed_values.meaning: The current app disables the listed Offline Files tasks.

app_current_implementation.notes: The app disables the two Offline Files synchronization tasks as part of the broader bundle.

windows_defaults.label: Offline Files task baseline
windows_defaults.applies_to: Windows systems with the Offline Files task folder present

states.rationale: Treat the task state as part of the normal Windows feature baseline unless a stronger reason exists.

recommended_profiles.label: Windows default
avoid_for: Research comparison of the current app bundle

states.rationale: Do not treat task-disable behavior as the first-class official control.

recommended_profiles.good_when: You want the feature baseline to remain closer to Windows defaults.
recommended_profiles.bad_when: You explicitly want the broader app bundle.
tradeoffs: Does not aggressively remove background sync jobs.

recommended_profiles.label: Current app bundle

states.rationale: Track the task-level behavior the app currently applies.

recommended_profiles.good_when: You are documenting the broader product behavior.
recommended_profiles.bad_when: You want only the validated policy mapping.
tradeoffs: Adds a broader implementation layer beyond the official feature policy.

evidence.title: Existing Offline Files policy record
evidence.summary: The validated policy record documents the official feature control separately from this task bundle.

evidence.title: Current privacy provider task bundle
evidence.summary: The provider disables the Offline Files background and logon synchronization tasks.

decision.why: The task bundle is broader than the single validated NetCache policy and should stay review-only.
blocking_issues: The task bundle is an observed implementation layer beyond the validated Offline Files feature policy.

validation_proof.exact_quote_or_path: Existing Offline Files policy record: The validated policy record documents the official feature control separately from this task bundle.
validation_proof.notes: Backfilled from evidence_id offline-policy-subrecord (repo-doc); deprecated audit trail.
